kinyarwanda.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Imikoreshereze y'imiryango ku bintu na serivisi. Igice kinini cya GDP.
kinyarwanda.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Imikoreshereze y'ubucuruzi ku bintu by'imari shingiro, ubwubatsi bushya, n'impinduka z'ububiko.
kinyarwanda.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Imikoreshereze ya guverinoma ku bintu na serivisi (hatabariwe kwimura nka ubwishingizi bw'imibereho).
kinyarwanda.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Ibyoherezwa mu mahanga bikuyemo ibitumizwa. Ubu ni bibi kuri Amerika (igihombo cy'ubucuruzi).
kinyarwanda.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Impinduka ku ijana muri GDP nyakuri. 2-3% ni byiza.
kinyarwanda.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Ipima impinduka z'ibiciro impuzandengo. Igipimo nyamukuru cy'izamuka ry'ibiciro.
kinyarwanda.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Ijanisha ry'abakozi badafite akazi. Igipimo gisanzwe ni hafi 4%.
kinyarwanda.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Inyungu amabanki asaba ayandi. Igikoresho nyamukuru cya Fed.
kinyarwanda.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Umubare w'amasosiyete 500 manini yo muri Amerika. Uhagarariye isoko ry'imigabane.
kinyarwanda.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Ubushakashatsi ku kuntu abaguzi bafite icyizere ku bukungu.
kinyarwanda.number_of_new_residential_construction: Umubare w'imishinga mishya y'ubwubatsi bw'amazu yatangiye.
kinyarwanda.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Ibyoherezwa mu mahanga bikuyemo ibitumizwa. Umurengera = byiza, igihombo = bibi.
kinyarwanda.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Igiteranyo cy'inguzanyo za guverinoma. Umwenda wa Amerika ni hafi $34 tiriliyoni (2024).
kinyarwanda.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Igaragaza ibipimo by'inyungu ku gihe cy'ubwishyu bw'impapuro. Guhindura = ikimenyetso cy'igabanuka.
kinyarwanda.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Ubushakashatsi ku bikorwa by'inganda. >50 = kwaguka, <50 = kugabanuka.
kinyarwanda.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Ipima ukudahwanya kw'amafaranga yinjira. 0 = uburinganire buzuye, 1 = ukudahwanya kwinshi.
kinyarwanda.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Uburyo bworoshye bw'ingengo y'imari buzwi cyane.
kinyarwanda.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Bitsa ijanisha rihamye mbere yo gukoresha ku kindi kintu.
kinyarwanda.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Buri dolari ihabwa akazi. Amafaranga yinjira akuyemo imikoreshereze = zeru neza.
kinyarwanda.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Kuki ibisabwa bya lisansi bitagabanuka nkuko wabitekereza?
kinyarwanda.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Kuki kuzamura ibipimo by'inyungu byangiza imigabane?
kinyarwanda.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Ni igihugu kihe gifite inyungu yo kugereranya muri mudasobwa?
kinyarwanda.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Ni iyihe ngaruka y'igihe kirekire ishoboka cyane?
kinyarwanda.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Ni iki igiciro nyakuri cy'ishuri ryisumbuye?
kinyarwanda.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Ni iyihe ngaruka y'ubukungu yakurikiye muri 2021-2022?
kinyarwanda.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Ni iki iyindi sitasiyo ya lisansi izakora?
kinyarwanda.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Ni ubuhe bwoko bwo kunanirwa kw'isoko ubu?
kinyarwanda.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Igiciro kizamuka ← ibisabwa bike, itangwa ryinshi. Igiciro kigabanuka ← ibisabwa byinshi, itangwa rike. Uburinganire: aho itangwa rihura n'ibisabwa.
kinyarwanda.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X−M). Ikoreshwa + Ishoramari + Guverinoma + Ibyoherezwa mu mahanga bibumbye. Ipima igiteranyo cy'umusaruro w'ubukungu.
kinyarwanda.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Gukurura ibisabwa: amafaranga menshi cyane akurikira ibintu. Gusunika igiciro: igiciro cy'umusaruro kizamuka. Byubatswe imbere: kwitega urwego rw'umushahara-igiciro.
kinyarwanda.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Ibipimo by'inyungu (FFR) • Ibikorwa by'isoko rifunguye (kugura/kugurisha impapuro) • Ibisabwa by'ububiko • Idirishya ry'igabanywa • Uburongozi bw'imbere
kinyarwanda.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Imisoro = Kongere (umusoro/imikoreshereze). Amafaranga = Fed (ibipimo by'inyungu/itangwa ry'amafaranga). Byombi bigira ingaruka ku bukungu mu buryo butandukanye.
kinyarwanda.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Gabanya 72 ku gipimo cy'inyungu kugira ngo umenye imyaka amafaranga yawe azikuba kabiri. 72 ÷ 8% = imyaka 9 kugira ngo yikube kabiri.
kinyarwanda.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Bihinduka (>1): iby'ubunini, bifite ibisimburwa. Bidahinduka (<1): ibikenewe, nta gisimburwa. Guhinduka kw'igice (=1): % impinduka P = % impinduka Q.
kinyarwanda.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Ipiganwa ryuzuye ← Ipiganwa ry'ubwigenge ← Oligopoly ← Ubwigenge. Imbaraga nyinshi z'isoko = ibiciro biri hejuru, ubushobozi buke.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Igishushanyo cy'itangwa-ibisabwa kigaragaza ibisabwa, itangwa, igiciro cy'uburinganire, ingano y'uburinganire, umurengera, kubura, n'ingaruka z'umusoro.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Igishushanyo cy'imari bwite kigaragaza ingengo y'imari ya buri kwezi nk'igishushanyo cy'uruziga n'iteganya ry'iyongera ry'inyungu ihurizwa.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_stock_market: Igishushanyo cy'isoko ry'imigabane kigaragaza amateka y'igiciro cy'isosiyete yatoranyijwe, amafaranga ya porefeye, ubwigenge, n'agaciro k'ubu.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Ahantu h'igishushanyo cy'imigabane hiteguye isoko ryakozwe. Tangira isimubula ry'isoko kugira ngo urebe amateka y'igiciro n'ubwigenge.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_macro: Dashboard y'ubukungu bw'igihugu igaragaza iyongera rya GDP, izamuka ry'ibiciro, igipimo cy'inyungu, igipimo cy'ubushomeri, uburinganire bw'ubucuruzi, n'amateka ya politiki.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_inquiry: Uburyo bwo kugenzura politiki bukoresha ibikoresho bine bya politiki kugira ngo bugereho ibisubizo bya makoro byoroshye. Koresha imirongo ya politiki hepfo kugereranya impinduka muri GDP, izamuka ry'ibiciro, n'ubushomeri.
kinyarwanda.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Saba abanyeshuri guhanura niba igiciro, ingano, umurengera, cyangwa kubura bihinduka mbere yo kwimura silayidi.
kinyarwanda.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Saba abanyeshuri kuvuga impinduka imwe mu ngengo y'imari n'impamvu imwe yo gutangira inyungu ihurizwa hakiri kare bituma unyungura.
kinyarwanda.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Saba abanyeshuri gutandukanya imigendekere y'igiciro, ishingiro ry'ubucuruzi, n'ibyago bya porefeye mu gusobanura kumwe.
kinyarwanda.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Saba abanyeshuri kugereranya umubare w'ibikombe kugira ngo bagere ku buringanire mbere yo gufungura ubucuruzi ku munsi umwe.
kinyarwanda.teacher_prompt_macro: Saba abanyeshuri gutoranya intego imwe ya politiki no kumenya igipimo kizerekana iterambere cyangwa igihombo.
kinyarwanda.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Baza abanyeshuri ni iyihe ikoresho rya politiki abahanga mu bukungu bazatandukanira cyane, hanyuma basobanure impamvu icyitegererezo ari ugereranya gusa.
kinyarwanda.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Itangwa n'ibisabwa — moteri yo kumenya igiciro
kinyarwanda.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Ibisabwa bijya hepfo (bihendutse = gura byinshi); itangwa rijya hejuru (bihenze = kora byinshi). Igiciro n'ingano by'uburinganire biri aho bihura. «Ubutunzi bw'Amahanga» (1776) bya Adam Smith biracyari urufatiro.
kinyarwanda.personal_finance_budgeting_saving_cred: Imari bwite — ingengo y'imari, kubitsa, inguzanyo
kinyarwanda.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: ibikenewe / ibyifuzwa / kubitsa. Inyungu ihurizwa ni igitangaza cya munani; kuri 7%, gutangira imyaka 30 hakiri kare bihindura $1 kuba $7.61. Ishyura ikarita y'inguzanyo yose — inyungu 19%/umwaka ni igipimo cy'ubukungeri.
kinyarwanda.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Isoko ry'imigabane — ubwigenge ku rwego rw'igice
kinyarwanda.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Gura umugabane umwe = kugira igice cy'isosiyete. S&P 500 yatanze inyungu impuzandengo ya hafi 10%/umwaka mu myaka 100. Tandukanya (ntugerekeze ku mugabane umwe), fata igihe kirekire (igihe mu isoko kiruta guhanura igihe cy'isoko).
kinyarwanda.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Amafaranga yinjira − igiciro = inyungu. Agace k'uburinganire ni igihe ibiciro bihamye byishyuwe. Ubucuruzi buto bwinshi bunanirwa mu mwaka wa 5; abarokotse babonye guhuza igicuruzwa-isoko. Igiciro cyo kubona umukiriya (CAC) n'agaciro k'ubuzima (LTV) ni imibare ya buri munsi y'uwashinze.
kinyarwanda.national_economy_gdp_inflation_unemplo: Ubukungu bw'igihugu — GDP, izamuka ry'ibiciro, ubushomeri
kinyarwanda.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP ipima igiteranyo cy'umusaruro; Umubare w'Ibiciro by'Abaguzi upima izamuka ry'ibiciro; ubushomeri bukoresha U-3 nk'ishingiro. Fed ishyiraho ibipimo by'inyungu kugira ngo iringanize iyongera n'izamuka ry'ibiciro — inshingano ebyiri Kongere yayihaye muri 1977.
kinyarwanda.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Kina simulasiyo kugira ngo uvumbure ibitekerezo by'ubukungu! Buri kintu cyigisha igitekerezo gishya kandi kongerwa hano.
kinyarwanda.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Reba uko izamuka ry'ibiciro rigabanya imbaraga zo kugura mu gihe. Dolari imwe y'uyu munsi ifite agaciro kurusha dolari imwe y'ejo!
kinyarwanda.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Ubukungu bunyura mu nziga zisubiramo zo kwaguka no kugabanuka. Kumenya aho turi mu ruziga bifasha guhanura intambwe ikurikira.
kinyarwanda.annual_return_percent: Inyungu ya buri mwaka, ku ijana
kinyarwanda.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: «Inyungu ihurizwa ni igitangaza cya munani cy'isi.» — Albert Einstein (baravuga)
kinyarwanda.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Abahanga mu bukungu ntibemeranya! Amashuri atandukanye atanga ibisubizo bitandukanye ku bibazo bimwe. Kumenya izi ndebe bigufasha gutekereza mu buryo bukiranuka ku politiki y'ubukungu.
kinyarwanda.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Amasoko atangira ku ipiganwa ryuzuye (abacuruzi benshi, ibicuruzwa bimwe) kugeza ku bwigenge (umucuruzi umwe, igicuruzwa cyihariye). Kanda kuri buri kimwe wige byinshi:
kinyarwanda.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Umusaruro w'Igihugu upima igiteranyo cy'agaciro k'ibintu na serivisi zose za nyuma zakozwe mu mbibi z'igihugu mu mwaka runaka. Kuri Amerika, bigabanywa gutya:
kinyarwanda.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Uko igiciro ↑, ingano isabwa ↓. Abaguzi bagura bike igihe igiciro kizamuka. Umurongo w'ibisabwa ujya hepfo.
kinyarwanda.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Uko igiciro ↑, ingano itangwa ↑. Abakora bakora byinshi igihe igiciro kiri hejuru. Umurongo w'itangwa ujya hejuru.
kinyarwanda.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Aho itangwa rihura n'ibisabwa. Iyi «E» ishyiraho igiciro cy'isoko (P*) n'ingano (Q*) mu buryo bwikora.
kinyarwanda.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Guhindura igiciro ni imigendekere ku murongo. Ibintu byo hanze (ikoranabuhanga, amafaranga yinjira, ibyifuzwa) byimura umurongo wose.
kinyarwanda.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Ibisabwa byimukiye iburyo — abantu benshi bashaka iki gicuruzwa (ahari amafaranga yinjira yazamutse, cyangwa ikimenyetso cyagituma kizwi). Ibi bizamura igiciro n'ingano by'uburinganire byombi.
kinyarwanda.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Ibisabwa byimukiye ibumoso — abantu bake bashaka iki gicuruzwa (igisimburwa cyahendutse, cyangwa ibyifuzwa byahindutse). Igiciro n'ingano bigabanuka byombi.
kinyarwanda.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Itangwa ryimukiye iburyo — abakora bashobora gukora bihendutse (ikoranabuhanga rishya, igiciro cyo hasi cy'ibyinjijwe). Igiciro kigabanuka, ariko ingano yiyongera.
kinyarwanda.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Itangwa ryimukiye ibumoso — umusaruro wabaye ugoye (impanuka karemano, amabwiriza). Igiciro kizamuka, ariko ingano igabanuka.
kinyarwanda.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: ipima uko ingano isabwa ihinduka igihe igiciro gihindutse.
kinyarwanda.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: ibintu (ibintu by'ubunini, ibicuruzwa bifite ibisimburwa) bibona igabanuka rinini ry'ibisabwa ku iyongera rito ry'igiciro.
kinyarwanda.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: ibintu (ibikenewe nk'imiti, lisansi) bigumana ibisabwa bihamye uko igiciro cyaba kimeze kose.
kinyarwanda.lower_monthly_cost_flexibility: Igiciro cyo hasi cya buri kwezi, guhinduka
kinyarwanda.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Kubaka umutungo, ariko inguzanyo y'amazu + ubuvugururwa
kinyarwanda.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Igabana ry'ishoramari (% y'umushahara wa buri mwaka washowe)
kinyarwanda.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Sobanura ubwoko bw'isoko ushaka gucuruzamo. AI izakora amasosiyete 5 y'ibihimbano afite amafaranga nyakuri.
kinyarwanda.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: urugero «amasosiyete mashya y'ingufu zishobora kuvugururwa», «amasosiyete y'imikino», «inganda z'ikirere», cyangwa siga ubusa ku ivange...
kinyarwanda.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Subiza isoko kandi ukore amasosiyete mashya
kinyarwanda.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Andika igitekerezo cyose cy'ubucuruzi kandi AI izakora igiciro cyawe cy'itangira, ikoreshwa rya buri munsi, n'ibiciro. Hanyuma uyicunge umunsi ku wundi!
kinyarwanda.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: urugero ikamyo y'ibiryo, kugendesha imbwa, kwigisha, uruganda rw'imigati, gukora porogaramu...
kinyarwanda.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP iragabanuka. Ubushomeri buriyongera. Ibisabwa rusange ntibihagije.
kinyarwanda.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Bidasanzwe kandi bibi: izamuka rinini ry'ibiciro + iyongera rito. Urugero rw'ihungabana rya OPEC ryo mu myaka ya 1970. Bigoye gukosora.
kinyarwanda.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Iyongera rikomeye ariko izamuka ry'ibiciro ririyongera. Banki nkuru ishobora gukanda feri cyane.
kinyarwanda.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP hejuru, izamuka ry'ibiciro rikurikiranywe. Agace keza — kirambye kuri ubu.
kinyarwanda.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Ingaruka nyakuri nto. Ibikoresho bya politiki bihanagurana hafi.
kinyarwanda.policy_inquiry_predict_the_macro_outco: 🔬 Kugenzura politiki — Hanura ibisubizo bya makoro
kinyarwanda.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Yimura ibikoresho bine bya politiki (umusoro, imikoreshereze ya guverinoma, igipimo cy'inyungu, umusoro w'ibitumizwa). Hanura imiterere ya makoro mbere yo kubisoma. Nta manota, nta kwerekana.
kinyarwanda.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Igitekerezo cyawe (mu buzima nyakuri, ni ikihe kikoresho abahanga mu bukungu batandukanira cyane? Kubera iki?)
kinyarwanda.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: urugero, umusoro w'ibitumizwa ukubita ibiciro vuba, ariko ingaruka kuri GDP iterwa n'ihorera...
kinyarwanda.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Ni ihe ivange rikora «guhagarara-kuzamuka»? Kubera iki ryababaje cyane muri politiki mu myaka ya 1970?
kinyarwanda.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Kugabanya umusoro n'imikoreshereze ya guverinoma byombi bikangura GDP. Ni ikihe gikora izamuka ry'ibiciro ryinshi kuri buri dolari yo gukangura? Kubera iki?
kinyarwanda.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Ni ryari banki nkuru izabigambiriye igatera igabanuka? (Volcker 1979-82.)
kinyarwanda.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Ese umusoro w'ibitumizwa ufasha abakozi bo mu gihugu mu gihe kirekire, cyangwa uzamura ibiciro ku bantu bose? Byombi? Impinduka iri he?
kinyarwanda.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Iyi widget ishyiraho mu buryo buhamye ibimenyetso bya Keynes byo mu gitabo. Mu bukungu bw'uruhande rw'itangwa, ni ibihe bimenyetso bihinduka? Munsi ya MMT? Munsi y'ubukungu bwa neoklasike (kwitega gushyize mu gaciro)? Aho icyitegererezo cya Keynes gitanga ikimenyetso kibi iyo bigereranyije n'amakuru y'isi nyakuri?
kinyarwanda.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu iri vange rya politiki rikora iyi miterere y'ubukungu bwa makoro.
kinyarwanda.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget yo kugenzura — nta manota, nta kwerekana, nta gusuka ibisubizo. Imibare ni ibigereranyo byo kwigisha, si icyitegererezo cya makoro nyakuri; ibisubizo nyakuri biterwa na sisitemu y'amafaranga, ubushobozi budakoreshwa, ibyitezwe, n'ubucuruzi bwo hanze. Ubukungu bwa makoro ni impaka — abahanga mu bukungu batandukanira ku kimenyetso n'ingano byombi.
kinyarwanda.soft_landing_desc: Nyuma y'imyaka 3+: iyongera 2–4%, izamuka ry'ibiciro 1–3%, ubushomeri <5%
kinyarwanda.logged_3_policy_mixes: Yanditse amavange ya politiki 3+ muri Kugenzura politiki
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_shortage: Igiciro cyo hejuru gikumira: kubura kwa hafi
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_surplus: Igiciro cyo hasi gikumira: umurengera wa hafi
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_tax_2: kuri buri gice ugabanya ubucuruzi kugera kuri hafi
kinyarwanda.canvas_probe_hint: Kanda igishushanyo — cyangwa ugishyireho ubugenzuzi hanyuma ukoreshe buto z'imyambi — kugira ngo ugereranye agaciro k'umuguzi n'igiciro cy'umukora ku ngano iyo ari yo yose.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_business: Dashboard y'ubucuruzi igaragaza amafaranga, isura nziza, ubukungu bw'igice, ahantu h'uburinganire, n'amateka y'inyungu ya buri munsi.
kinyarwanda.canvas_summary_business_empty: Ahantu ha dashboard y'ubucuruzi haracyari ubusa. Tangira ubucuruzi hepfo kugira ngo urebe amafaranga, isura nziza, n'inyungu ya buri munsi hano.
kinyarwanda.literacy_tooltip: Ubumenyi bw'ubukungu bwiyongera hamwe n'ibitekerezo wize, imyaka wanyuzemo muri za simulateri, ukuri kw'ikizamini, n'ibyagezweho wabonye
kinyarwanda.policy_inquiry_hero_hint: Imura ibikoresho, uhanure imiterere ya makoro MBERE yo kuyisoma, hanyuma urengere impamvu zawe. Inzobere z'ubukungu nyazo zitavuga rumwe rwose ku bimenyetso n'ubunini bwabyo.
kinyarwanda.try_supply_demand: Gerageza: shyiraho Igiciro cyo hejuru cya $30 (kugenzura ubukode). Banza uhanure — ni ibice bingahe bizabura ku isoko?
kinyarwanda.try_personal_finance: Gerageza: shora 15% muri “Balanced” hanyuma uhitemo inzu yo gusangira icyumba. Reba agaciro nyakuri ugereranyije n'amafaranga mu myaka 5.
kinyarwanda.try_stock_market: Gerageza: cururiza iminsi 5, hanyuma ugereranye inyungu yawe n'akadirishya k'Umubare wo kugura-no-kubika. Ni nde uri gutsinda?
kinyarwanda.try_entrepreneur: Gerageza: shakisha ahantu hawe h'uburinganire mbere yo gufungura, hanyuma ugerageze igiciro kiri hejuru ku 50% ku munsi umwe. Inyungu yagenze ite?
kinyarwanda.try_macro: Gerageza: hitamo “Gutuza izamuka ry'ibiciro” nk'intego yawe, uzamure igipimo cy'inyungu ku manota 2, hanyuma utere imbere umwaka umwe.
kinyarwanda.try_inquiry: Gerageza: tera guhagarara-kuzamuka (izamuka ry'ibiciro rikabije + GDP igabanuka) ukoresheje kwimura ibikoresho bike bishoboka.
kinyarwanda.glossary_copied: Inkoranyamagambo yakoporowe — uyishyire mu nyandiko zawe
kinyarwanda.quiz_failed_offline_hint: Gukora ikizamini byanze — gerageza ibihe by'ibibazo biri mu bikoresho by'ikimenyetso (bikora nta interineti)
kinyarwanda.scenario_complete_3: . Ibihe birasubirwamo — washobora kurenza urukurikirane rwawe?
kinyarwanda.demand_flatter: — biringaniye kurushaho, BIHINDUKA kurushaho: abaguzi bitabira cyane igiciro (ibintu by'ubunini, ibicuruzwa bifite ibisimbura).
kinyarwanda.demand_steeper: — bihanamye kurushaho, BIDAHINDUKA kurushaho: abaguzi ntibahindura ingano n'ubwo igiciro cyahinduka (ibikenewe nka lisansi cyangwa imiti).
kinyarwanda.supply_flatter: — biringaniye kurushaho, BIHINDUKA kurushaho: abakora bashobora kongera cyangwa kugabanya umusaruro byoroshye (ibicuruzwa by'uruganda).
kinyarwanda.supply_steeper: — bihanamye kurushaho, BIDAHINDUKA kurushaho: birakomeye guhindura umusaruro vuba (amazu, ubutaka bw'ubuhinzi, intebe z'igitaramo).
kinyarwanda.tax_incidence_1: — «icyuho cy'umusoro» gifungura hagati y'ibyo umuguzi yishyura n'ibyo umucuruzi abika, kandi ubucuruzi bumwe na bumwe bugirira impande zombi akamaro buhagarara (IGIHOMBO KITAGIRIRA UMUNTU AKAMARO). Ubu abaguzi bikorera ~
kinyarwanda.tax_incidence_3: % — uruhande RUDAHINDUKA kurushaho (ruhanamye) rusanzwe rwikorera byinshi. Unamure za silayidi z'ihindagurika hanyuma urebe uko igabana rihinduka.
kinyarwanda.slope_note: 📚 Biringaniye = bihinduka: abantu bitabira cyane igiciro (ubunini, ibisimbura). Bihanamye = bidahinduka: ntibashobora guhindura imyitwarire byoroshye (lisansi, imiti). Namura imirongo hanyuma urebe uwikorera umusoro.
kinyarwanda.cash_flow_warning: ⚠️ Amafaranga yawe ari munsi ya zeru — urakoresha kurenza ibyo winjiza. Gerageza inzu ihendutse, ijanisha rito ry'ishoramari, cyangwa kwishyura umwenda mbere y'uko wiyongera n'inyungu.
kinyarwanda.emergency_fund_target: abajyanama bagira inama yo kubika ay'amezi 3–6
kinyarwanda.flow_footnote: * si igice cy'amafaranga ahari — iyongera ryiyongera imbere muri porefeye yawe; inyungu yiyongera imbere mu mwenda wawe.
kinyarwanda.index_lesson: 📚 Umubare wo kugura-no-kubika uri gutsinda ubucuruzi bwawe. Abacuruzi benshi bakora cyane babona bike kurusha abafashe byose gusa — ni yo mpamvu ingoboka z'umubare ari inama isanzwe.
kinyarwanda.concentration_warning: ⚠️ Hejuru ya 70% by'agaciro k'imigabane yawe biri muri sosiyete imwe. Gutandukanya ishoramari bigabanya ingaruka za sosiyete imwe — sakaza ishoramari ryawe.
kinyarwanda.biz_cash_warning: ⚠️ Ubucuruzi bwawe buri guhomba — amafaranga ari munsi ya zeru. Genzura ubukungu bw'igice cyawe: igiciro gitwikira igiciro cy'igice NA ruhare rwawe mu biciro bihoraho? Kuzamura igiciro, kugabanya ikiguzi, cyangwa kubaka isura nziza ni byo bikoresho byawe.
kinyarwanda.below_cost_warning: ⚠️ Igiciro kiri munsi y'igiciro cy'igice — urahomba kuri BURI gurisha.
kinyarwanda.high_price_hint: 📚 Igiciro kiri hejuru cyane y'icyagiriwe inama — tegereza ko ibisabwa bizagabanuka (guhinduka kw'igiciro).
kinyarwanda.shock_oil_lesson: Ihungabana ry'itangwa rizamura ibiciro KANDI rigabanya umusaruro icyarimwe — igitutu cyo guhagarara-kuzamuka, nk'ihagarikwa rya OPEC ryo mu 1973.
kinyarwanda.shock_tech_lesson: Iyongera ry'umusaruro ni ifunguro ry'ubuntu ridasanzwe: umusaruro mwinshi kuri buri mukozi uzamura GDP nta kuzamura izamuka ry'ibiciro.
kinyarwanda.shock_financial_lesson: Kubura kw'inguzanyo bisenya ibisabwa: GDP, ibiciro, n'akazi byose bigwa hamwe, nk'uko byagenze mu 2008.
kinyarwanda.shock_trade_war_lesson: Imisoro y'ibitumizwa izamura ibiciro by'ibitumizwa mu gihugu kandi ihamagara guhorera abohereza ibicuruzwa bawe mu mahanga.
kinyarwanda.shock_consumer_boom_lesson: Ibyitezwe byimura ubukungu: iyo ingo zumva zifite umutekano zirakoresha, kandi imikoreshereze y'umwe ni amafaranga yinjira y'undi.
kinyarwanda.report_spend_up_2: % bya GDP yongereye ibisabwa (umukubisho wa Keynes) — ariko amaherezo ibiheranyweho bigomba kubonerwa amafaranga.
kinyarwanda.report_spend_down_2: % bya GDP kwakuye ibisabwa mu bukungu.
kinyarwanda.report_tax_up_2: % kwasigiye ingo amafaranga make yo gukoresha, bituza ibisabwa.
kinyarwanda.report_tax_down_2: % kwasigiye ingo amafaranga menshi yo gukoresha, byongera ibisabwa.
kinyarwanda.report_rate_high: 🏦 Ibipimo by'inyungu biri hejuru y'igipimo cyo hagati cya ~3% byatumye kuguza bihenda — ishoramari no gushaka abakozi byaragabanutse (feri ya politiki y'amafaranga).
kinyarwanda.report_rate_low: 🏦 Ibipimo by'inyungu biri munsi y'icyo hagati byatumye kuguza bihendutse — ibisabwa byatewe n'inguzanyo byariyongereye (pedali ya politiki y'amafaranga).
kinyarwanda.report_okun_2: % ugereranyije n'icyerekezo cya ~2% ryimuye ubushomeri kugera kuri
kinyarwanda.goal_missed_inflation: (byerekeje mu cyerekezo kitari cyo — ni ikihe gikoresho kizamura ikiguzi cyo kuguza?)
kinyarwanda.goal_missed_growth: (ni iki cyongera ibisabwa — imikoreshereze, kugabanya umusoro, cyangwa inguzanyo ihendutse?)
kinyarwanda.goal_missed_unemployment: (Itegeko rya Okun: ubushomeri buragabanuka iyo iyongera rirenze icyerekezo cya ~2%)
kinyarwanda.policy_goal_label: 🎯 Intego ya politiki (hitamo imwe, hanura, hanyuma utere imbere):
kinyarwanda.real_rate_negative: Ibipimo nyakuri biri munsi ya zeru bisobanura ko abaguza batsinda naho abazigama bahomba — bitera ubukungu cyane.
kinyarwanda.real_rate_positive: Ibipimo nyakuri biri hejuru ya zeru bihemba kuzigama kandi bigabanya kuguza — biragabanya.
kinyarwanda.spending_change_2: Impinduka y'imikoreshereze ya guverinoma, ijanisha rya GDP
kinyarwanda.deficit_note: 📚 Gukoresha byinshi mu gihe usoresha bike = imikoreshereze y'ibiheranyweho. Bitera ubukungu ubu, ariko uwo mwenda ni ikirego ku basora bo mu gihe kizaza.
kinyarwanda.economy_reset: ♻ Ubukungu bwasubijwe ku rwego rw'ibanze rwa 2025
kinyarwanda.macro_model_disclaimer: Icyitegererezo cyoroshye gifite ibimenyetso bya Keynes byo mu gitabo n'ubushomeri bushingiye ku itegeko rya Okun — NTABWO ari iteganya. Ubukungu nyabwo bushingira ku byitezwe, ku kwizerwa, no ku miterere y'isi, kandi inzobere z'ubukungu ntizivuga rumwe rwose kuri ibi bipimo (reba «Amashuri y'ibitekerezo» mu bikoresho by'ikimenyetso).
